title: dactylorhiza × hallii subsp. nummiana
intro: Dactylorhiza × hallii subsp. nummiana, a hybrid orchid species, is a unique and rare plant that is native to the Himalayan region. This orchid is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a vasodilator, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems and cardiovascular conditions. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × hallii subsp. nummiana include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and alleviate pain, as well as its antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use as a medicinal plant is not widely established and more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
